item.title: Labor Day, Mechanic Shop, PACE
item.ns0:title: Labour Week Activities Officially Launch with Historic Change to Annual Parade Route — Sunday, May 31st, 2026
item.description:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, Labour Week activities officially kick off with a historic change to the annual parade route while frustrated residents in a New Providence community plead for intervention over a neighbourhood mechanic shop. We celebrate the newest class of RBDF Rangers in Grand Bahama and take an emotional look at the PACE Foundation’s efforts to support teen mothers facing a cycle of abuse and trauma. Stay tuned for a critical update as the 2026 hurricane season begins, along with national soccer championship highlights and your complete holiday weekend weather outlook.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.

Tonight on Our News Weekend, Labour Week activities officially kick off with a historic change to the annual parade route while frustrated residents in a New Providence community plead for intervention over a neighbourhood mechanic shop. We celebrate the newest class of RBDF Rangers in Grand Bahama and take an emotional look at the PACE Foundation’s efforts to support teen mothers facing a cycle of abuse and trauma. Stay tuned for a critical update as the 2026 hurricane season begins, along with national soccer championship highlights and your complete holiday weekend weather outlook.

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, Labour Week activities officially kick off with a historic change to the annual parade route while frustrated residents in a New Providence community plead for intervention over a neighbourhood mechanic shop. We celebrate the newest class of RBDF Rangers in Grand Bahama and take an emotional look at the PACE Foundation’s efforts to support teen mothers facing a cycle of abuse and trauma. Stay tuned for a critical update as the 2026 hurricane season begins, along with national soccer championship highlights and your complete holiday weekend weather outlook.
